vineyards.name: Planeta
vineyards.address: Contrada Dispensa, 92013 Menfi (AG), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.classification: Menfi DOC, Etna DOC, Noto DOC, Sicilia DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Three estate cellar doors: Ulmo at Menfi, Buonivini at Noto, and Sciaranuova on Etna. Tasting experiences bookable on the Planeta estate website.
vineyards.description: One of Sicily's most influential estates, Planeta operates six wineries across the island from Menfi to Etna, Noto and Milazzo, showcasing the diversity of Sicilian terroir through native and international varieties.

vineyards.name: Tasca d'Almerita
vineyards.address: Contrada Regaleali, 90020 Sclafani Bagni (PA), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.classification: Contea di Sclafani DOC, Etna DOC, Sicilia DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Estate visits and tastings at the historic Regaleali property in the heart of Sicily, bookable via the Tasca d'Almerita website.
vineyards.description: One of Sicily's oldest and most storied family estates, Tasca d'Almerita has farmed the Regaleali plateau since 1830. Their Rosso del Conte, a Nero d'Avola-led flagship, is among the island's most age-worthy reds.

vineyards.name: Donnafugata
vineyards.address: Via Sebastiano Lipari 18, 91025 Marsala (TP), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.classification: Contessa Entellina DOC, Marsala DOC, Pantelleria DOC, Etna DOC, Sicilia DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Daily guided tours and tastings at the historic Marsala cantina (10:00-18:00) and at the Contessa Entellina estate. Reservations required.
vineyards.description: Donnafugata, founded by the Rallo family in Marsala, has grown into a multi-estate Sicilian producer with vineyards in Contessa Entellina, Pantelleria and Etna, crafting wines from native varieties including the iconic Ben Rye passito.

vineyards.name: Cantine Florio
vineyards.address: Via Vincenzo Florio 1, 91025 Marsala (TP), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Guided cellar tours of the historic 165-metre tuff-stone barrel chambers. Over 50,000 visitors annually. Bookable via the Cantine Florio website.
vineyards.description: Founded by Vincenzo Florio in 1833, Cantine Florio is the most iconic Marsala house in Sicily. Its historic tuff-stone cellars, with 104 arches and 1,400 barrels, are a landmark of western Sicilian wine history.

vineyards.name: Cantine Pellegrino
vineyards.address: Via Paolo Pellegrino 39, 91025 Marsala (TP), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine tourism at the historic Marsala cellars via the Pellegrino Ouverture booking platform. Guided tours, tastings and food pairings.
vineyards.description: Established in 1880, sixth-generation family-owned Cantine Pellegrino built its reputation on Marsala and Pantelleria passito wines. Its historic Marsala cellars are among the most visited in western Sicily.

vineyards.name: Marco De Bartoli
vineyards.address: Contrada Samperi 292, 91025 Marsala (TP), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Guided tours and tastings at the Samperi cellar near Marsala. Weekday visits by appointment. Contact by phone (+39 0923 962093) or email.
vineyards.description: Marco De Bartoli founded this artisan Marsala house in 1978, working primarily with Grillo to revive traditional un-fortified and minimally fortified styles. The estate at Samperi is the spiritual home of authentic Marsala craft.

vineyards.name: Benanti Viticoltori
vineyards.address: Via Giuseppe Garibaldi 361, 95029 Viagrande (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tuesday through Sunday by reservation. Three tasting programmes including Get to Know Etna, Contrade Selection and Library Vintages. Tours of the historic palmento and vineyard.
vineyards.description: One of Etna's pioneering estates, Benanti has been producing wine on the volcanic slopes since 1734. Their single-contrada whites from Milo are benchmarks for Etna Bianco Superiore, and their Nerello reds helped launch the modern Etna renaissance.

vineyards.name: Tenuta delle Terre Nere
vineyards.address: Contrada Calderara sn, 95036 Randazzo (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: By appointment, Monday to Friday. Contact via visite@tenutaterrenere.com.
vineyards.description: Founded in 2002 by Marc de Grazia on Etna's north slope at Randazzo, Tenuta delle Terre Nere was instrumental in establishing the single-contrada bottlings that made Etna internationally famous. Old-vine Nerello from plots like Calderara Sottana and Guardiola set the benchmark.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Calderara, sn 95036 Randazzo (CT) - Sicilia - Italia

vineyards.name: Passopisciaro (Vini Franchetti)
vineyards.address: Via Canonico Zumbo 1, Passopisciaro, 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment at the Passopisciaro estate. Contact via the Vini Franchetti website.
vineyards.description: Founded in 2000 by the late Andrea Franchetti at approximately 1,000 metres on Etna's north slope, Passopisciaro produces site-expressive single-contrada Nerello reds including the rare Franchetti red from the high-altitude Solicchiata plots.

verified.address_quoted: Via Canonico Zumbo, 1 (hamlet of Passopisciaro) IT - 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT) Etna Nord - Sicily

vineyards.name: Graci
vineyards.address: Contrada Feudo di Mezzo, SP7iii, Passopisciaro, 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment at the Passopisciaro estate. Contact via info@graci.eu.
vineyards.description: Alberto Aiello Graci has been farming old-vine Nerello Mascalese and Carricante on Etna's north slope since 2004, producing single-contrada wines including the benchmark Arcuria Etna Rosso from 52 acres of ungrafted vines.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Feudo di Mezzo, SP7iii, Passopisciaro 95012, Castiglione di Sicilia(CT)

vineyards.name: Pietradolce
vineyards.address: SS120 174, Contrada Rampante, Solicchiata, 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the Solicchiata winery on Etna's north slope. Contact via the Pietradolce website.
vineyards.description: Founded in 2005 by Michele Faro at Solicchiata on Etna's north slope, Pietradolce works with old-vine Nerello Mascalese and Carricante across several contrade, producing one of the island's most age-worthy single-vineyard Biancos in the Archineri.

verified.address_quoted: SS120, 174, C.da. Rampante, Solicchiata, Castiglione di Sicilia (CT)

vineyards.name: Girolamo Russo
vineyards.address: Via Regina Margherita 78, 95012 Passopisciaro (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Vineyard visits and tastings with local cold cuts, cheeses and homemade bread. Contact info@girolamorusso.it or call 0942 983142.
vineyards.description: Giuseppe Russo took over the family's old Nerello Mascalese vineyards in 2005 after his father Girolamo died. Fifteen hectares of organically farmed vines between 650 and 780 metres on Etna's north slope produce sought-after single-vineyard reds including San Lorenzo and a Rina.

vineyards.name: Azienda Vinicola Calabretta
vineyards.address: Contrada Calderara, 95036 Randazzo (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment at the Randazzo estate. Contact via calabretta.net.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1900, Calabretta is one of Etna's oldest family wineries. The fourth generation farms 12.5 hectares of ungrafted old vines with copper and sulphur only, producing low-intervention wines from Nerello Mascalese that rank among the most authentic expressions of the north slope.

vineyards.name: Cottanera
vineyards.address: Strada Provinciale 89, Contrada Iannazzo, 95030 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Monday to Saturday 9:00 to 17:00, booking essential. Guided vineyard, cellar and tasting experiences.
vineyards.description: Cottanera is a family estate on Etna's north slope producing both native Nerello-based Etna DOC wines and international varieties grown at high altitude. The boutique agriturismo Dimora Cottanera makes it a wine-tourism anchor on the Alcantara Valley rim.

verified.address_quoted: Strada Provinciale, 89 - 95030 - Contrada Iannazzo Castiglione di Sicilia (CT)

vineyards.name: Murgo
vineyards.address: Via Zafferana 13, 95010 Santa Venerina (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine tastings available Monday to Saturday 11:30 to 14:00. Restaurant and accommodation on site.
vineyards.description: A historic estate on Etna's eastern slopes, Murgo introduced Sicily's most acclaimed traditional-method sparkling wine in 1990 using Nerello Mascalese. The 30-hectare property has been in the Scammacca del Murgo family since 1860.

vineyards.name: Frank Cornelissen
vineyards.address: Via Canonico Zumbo 1, Passopisciaro, 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Five tasting experiences from the Classic (5 wines, EU40) to the Magma private (6 crus including Grand Vin Magma, EU1,400 for up to 6 people). E-bike vineyard tours available. Book via pr@frankcornelissen.it.
vineyards.description: Belgian natural-wine pioneer Frank Cornelissen established his estate on Etna's north slope in 2001, working without sulphur at all. His Magma cuvee from ungrafted pre-phylloxera Nerello vines above 1,000 metres is among Sicily's most sought-after cult wines.

verified.address_quoted: Via Canonico Zumbo, 1 (hamlet of Passopisciaro) IT - 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT) Etna Nord - Sicily

vineyards.name: COS
vineyards.address: SP3 Acate-Chiaramonte Km 14,300, 97019 Vittoria (RG), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.classification: Cerasuolo di Vittoria DOCG, Vittoria DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Winery visits by reservation only. Contact via the COS website or telephone (+39 0932 876145).
vineyards.description: Founded in 1980 by Giambattista Cilia, Cirino Strano and Giusto Occhipinti, COS pioneered biodynamic farming and amphora fermentation in Sicily. Their Cerasuolo di Vittoria DOCG from Nero d'Avola and Frappato is the defining expression of the appellation.

vineyards.name: Arianna Occhipinti
vineyards.address: SP68 Vittoria-Pedalino Km 3,3, 97019 Vittoria (RG), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.classification: Cerasuolo di Vittoria DOCG, Vittoria DOC, IGP Terre Siciliane
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by reservation year-round, mornings or afternoons. Vineyard walk, cellar tour and wine and oil tasting with olives and bruschetta. Languages: Italian, English, French. Contact +39 0932 1865519.
vineyards.description: Arianna Occhipinti started with one hectare along the SP68 road in 2004 and has grown to 40 hectares farmed organically and biodynamically. Her SP68 Rosso blending Frappato and Nero d'Avola is among Italy's most celebrated natural wines.

verified.address_quoted: SP68 VITTORIA-PEDALINO KM 3,3 - 97019 VITTORIA (RG) SICILY ITALY

vineyards.name: Valle dell'Acate
vineyards.address: Contrada Biddini Soprano, 97011 Acate (RG), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.classification: Cerasuolo di Vittoria DOCG, Vittoria DOC, Sicilia DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Classic wine tastings, chef-led pairings, cooking courses and vineyard walks at the Acate estate.
vineyards.description: Six generations of the Jacono family have farmed these 70 hectares in the Ragusa province. Gaetana Jacono runs the estate, producing organic Frappato and Nero d'Avola that anchor their acclaimed Cerasuolo di Vittoria DOCG blend.

vineyards.name: Gulfi
vineyards.address: Contrada Maccari, Strada Prov. Noto-Pachino Km 13.5, 96017 Noto (SR), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the Noto estate. Contact info@gulfi.it.
vineyards.description: Gulfi owns some of the oldest Nero d'Avola parcels in the Pachino area, including pre-phylloxera crus at Maccaraj, Bufaleffj, Baronj and Sanlorenzo. The estate's four single-vineyard bottlings set the benchmark for terroir-expressive Nero d'Avola.

verified.address_quoted: C. Maccari, Strada Prov. Noto-Pachino, KM 13.5, 96017 Noto (SR)

vineyards.name: Feudo Montoni
vineyards.address: Contrada Montoni Vecchi, 92022 Cammarata (AG), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment at the Cammarata estate in central Sicily. Contact info@feudomontoni.it.
vineyards.description: Fabio Sireci's Feudo Montoni sits in the hills of central Sicily at Cammarata, farming pre-phylloxera Nero d'Avola vines. The Vrucara single-vineyard bottling from ungrafted vines is one of Sicily's most distinctive and sought-after Nero d'Avola expressions.

vineyards.name: Firriato
vineyards.address: Via Trapani 4, 91027 Paceco (TP), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Guided cellar tours, vineyard visits and tastings at the Baglio Soria resort in Paceco and at Cavanera Etnea on Etna. By appointment.
vineyards.description: Founded by Salvatore Di Gaetano in 1978, Firriato has grown into one of Sicily's largest and most diverse producers with approximately 490 hectares across seven estates. Their reach spans from the Trapani hills to Etna and the island of Favignana.

vineyards.name: Cusumano
vineyards.address: SS113 Km 307, Contrada San Carlo, 90047 Partinico (PA), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine tastings and direct sales at the Partinico winery. Contact info@cusumano.it or call +39 091 8908713.
vineyards.description: Brothers Alberto and Diego Cusumano founded their estate in 2001 at Partinico with five estate vineyards and more than 500 hectares. The Sagana single-vineyard Nero d'Avola from Riesi and Alta Mora Etna range mark their quality poles.

verified.address_quoted: SS 113 Km 307, Contrada San Carlo, 90047 Partinico (PA)

vineyards.name: Baglio di Pianetto
vineyards.address: Via Francia, 90030 Santa Cristina Gela (PA), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Private visits and introductory wine courses at the 20-room agrirelais. Monday to Friday 09:00 to 17:00 by appointment.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1997 by Count Paolo Marzotto, Baglio di Pianetto sits at 900 metres near Santa Cristina Gela, 25 kilometres from Palermo. The estate blends Sicilian and French winemaking traditions across 106 hectares, with an elegant agrirelais for overnight stays.

verified.address_quoted: Via Francia, Santa Cristina Gela - Palermo, Italy

vineyards.name: Feudi del Pisciotto
vineyards.address: Contrada del Pisciotto, 93015 Niscemi (CL), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.classification: Cerasuolo di Vittoria DOCG, Sicilia DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine Relais with boutique hotel, restaurant and wine experiences at the restored 18th-century manor in the Val di Noto.
vineyards.description: Feudi del Pisciotto is an 18th-century restored manor on the edge of the Sughereta di Niscemi Nature Reserve producing wines in the Val di Noto. It is also a Wine Relais hotel with restaurant, combining Sicilian wine culture with upscale rural hospitality.

vineyards.name: Morgante
vineyards.address: Contrada Racalmare, 92020 Grotte (AG), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Winery visits by appointment. Contact info@morgantevini.it or call +39 0922 945579.
vineyards.description: The Morgante family at Grotte in the Agrigento province focuses almost exclusively on Nero d'Avola, producing a standard and a single-vineyard Don Antonio from vineyards in the hot hilly interior of Sicily.

vineyards.name: Zisola (Mazzei)
vineyards.address: Contrada Zisola, 96017 Noto (SR), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.classification: Noto DOC, Eloro DOC, Sicilia DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine tours and tastings at the Noto estate. Reserve via enoteca@zisola.it or call +39 0931 839288.
vineyards.description: The Mazzei family of Tuscany established Zisola near Noto in 2003, planting 50 hectares with Nero d'Avola and Syrah. The estate overlooks the Baroque town of Noto and produces wines that blend Tuscan winemaking precision with Sicilian terroir.

vineyards.name: Tenuta di Fessina
vineyards.address: Contrada Rovittello, Via Nazionale SS120 22, 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Open every day including holidays. Tasting reception at 10:30, 13:30 and 15:30. Contact fessina@tenutadifessina.com or call +39 345 7230176.
vineyards.description: Silvia Maestrelli's Tenuta di Fessina in Rovittello at 670 metres on Etna's north slope offers one of the island's most accessible high-quality tasting experiences. The organic estate produces refined Nerello Mascalese and Carricante across its Etna DOC range.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Rovittello, Via Nazionale SS 120, 22, Castiglione di Sicilia (CT)

vineyards.name: Palmento Costanzo
vineyards.address: Contrada Santo Spirito, Passopisciaro, 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visite e Degustazioni bookable via the estate website. Contact info@palmentocostanzo.com or call +39 0942 983239.
vineyards.description: Founded in 2011 by Mimmo and Valeria Costanzo, Palmento Costanzo farms approximately ten hectares organically on Etna's north slope in Contrada Santo Spirito. They produce contrada-specific wines with manual cultivation and a fully organic approach.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Santo Spirito Passopisciaro 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia

vineyards.name: Tornatore
vineyards.address: Via Pietramarina 8, 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Guided tours and tastings at the estate, described as the largest single vineyard in Etna DOC. Contact +39 337 1087964.
vineyards.description: The Tornatore family has farmed on Etna since 1865, with a large single-vineyard block in the Castiglione di Sicilia hills. Their estate is often cited as Etna DOC's largest single property, producing a full range of DOC wines from Nerello and Carricante.

verified.address_quoted: Azienda Agricola Francesco Tornatore - Via Pietramarina, 8 - 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT) - Italy

vineyards.name: Tenute Nicosia
vineyards.address: Via Luigi Capuana 65, 95039 Trecastagni (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.classification: Etna DOC, Cerasuolo di Vittoria DOCG, Sicilia DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Guided tours and tastings by reservation at the Trecastagni winery. Multiple tasting packages including Contrade dell'Etna. Contact info@cantinenicosia.it.
vineyards.description: Tenute Nicosia operates vineyards on Etna and in Vittoria, producing organic wines across a broad range including Etna DOC and Cerasuolo di Vittoria DOCG. Their Trecastagni winery on the south-east slope of Etna is a key wine-tourism destination.

vineyards.name: Baglio del Cristo di Campobello
vineyards.address: Contrada Favarotta SS123 Km 19+200, 92023 Campobello di Licata (AG), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Winery visits and tastings at the Campobello di Licata estate. Contact via the estate website.
vineyards.description: Founded in 2000 by the Bonetta family near Agrigento, Baglio del Cristo di Campobello farms 50 hectares on calcareous chalky soils 8 kilometres from the sea. Their Adennzia white and Lu Patri red have earned international recognition for quality Sicilian DOC wines.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Favarotta S.S. 123 km 19+200, 92023 Campobello di Licata (AG)

vineyards.name: Settesoli Mandrarossa
vineyards.address: Contrada Puccia, 92013 Menfi (AG), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tuesday to Saturday 09:30 to 18:00. Guided cellar visits and wine tastings. Reservations required.
vineyards.description: Cantine Settesoli is the cooperative giant of Menfi DOC, founded in 1958, with Mandrarossa as its premium terroir-selection brand launched in 1999. Over 2,000 grower-members supply grapes from more than 6,000 hectares, making this the largest wine operation in Sicily.

vineyards.name: Tenuta Gatti
vineyards.address: Via Vignola, 98064 Librizzi (ME), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the historic Nebrodi estate with views toward the Aeolian Islands. Contact via winetourism.com.
vineyards.description: A historic organic estate spanning 217 hectares founded in 1825 at Librizzi in the Messina province, set on the Nebrodi slopes with views to the Aeolian Islands. Tenuta Gatti cultivates an unusually diverse mix of native and international varieties.

vineyards.name: Tenuta Tascante (Tasca d'Almerita on Etna)
vineyards.address: Contrada Rampante, 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits bookable via the Tasca d'Almerita website. Estate is located in Contrada Rampante on Etna's north slope.
vineyards.description: Tasca d'Almerita's Etna estate in Castiglione di Sicilia, established around 2010, produces contrada-expressive Nerello Mascalese reds and Carricante whites within the Etna DOC. Ghiaia Nera is the benchmark cuvee of the estate.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Rampante, Castiglione di Sicilia, Etna, Sicily

vineyards.name: Cantina Rallo
vineyards.address: Via Vincenzo Florio 2, 91025 Marsala (TP), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.classification: Marsala DOC, Alcamo DOC, Pantelleria DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Historic Marsala cellar visits and tastings. Contact via the Rallo website.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1860 by Diego Rallo, one of Marsala's oldest historic families. The Vesco family acquired the estate in 1996, integrating vineyards in Alcamo and Pantelleria with the historic Marsala cellars. Today the estate operates across western Sicily's key appellations.

vineyards.name: Planeta Sciaranuova (Etna)
vineyards.address: Contrada Sciaranuova, Solicchiata, 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting experience at the Sciaranuova winery. Bookable via the Planeta estate website.
vineyards.description: Planeta's Etna estate in Solicchiata, established in 2008, produces Nerello Mascalese and Carricante within the Etna DOC. The Sciaranuova winery is one of the island's most architecturally striking cellar doors.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Sciaranuova, Solicchiata, Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily

vineyards.name: Planeta Buonivini (Noto)
vineyards.address: Contrada Buonivini, 96017 Noto (SR), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting experience at the Buonivini winery near Noto. Bookable via the Planeta estate website.
vineyards.description: Planeta's Noto estate produces Nero d'Avola and Moscato di Noto from the sun-drenched south-east of Sicily. The Buonivini contrada is within the historic Noto DOC, home to some of Sicily's oldest Nero d'Avola vines.

vineyards.name: Donnafugata Pantelleria
vineyards.address: Via S. Michele, 91017 Pantelleria (TP), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.classification: Passito di Pantelleria DOC, Pantelleria DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Estate visits on Pantelleria. Bookable via the Donnafugata visit site.
vineyards.description: Donnafugata's Pantelleria estate produces the celebrated Ben Rye Passito di Pantelleria DOC from Zibibbo (Moscato d'Alessandria) vines trained in the alberello pantesco system on volcanic soils. Ben Rye is consistently rated among Italy's finest sweet wines.

vineyards.name: Marco De Bartoli - Bukkuram (Pantelleria)
vineyards.address: Via S. Michele 41, 91017 Pantelleria (TP), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.classification: Passito di Pantelleria DOC, Moscato di Pantelleria DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment on Pantelleria. Contact via the Marco De Bartoli website.
vineyards.description: Marco De Bartoli's Pantelleria estate at Bukkuram produces the Sole d'Agosto passito from Zibibbo vines trained in the alberello pantesco system. The wine is a benchmark of minimal-intervention Pantelleria passito style.

vineyards.name: Alta Mora by Cusumano (Etna)
vineyards.address: Contrada Verzella, 95012 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Etna estate tastings bookable via the Cusumano website.
vineyards.description: Cusumano's Etna label Alta Mora is produced from the Verzella contrada on the north slope of Etna. The range focuses on Nerello Mascalese for reds and Carricante for whites, with contrada bottlings among the island's most accessible Etna expressions.

vineyards.name: Cantine Milazzo
vineyards.address: Contrada Feudo Soprano, 98057 Milazzo (ME), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Winery visits and tastings at the Milazzo estate near the Tyrrhenian coast. Contact via the winery.
vineyards.description: Cantine Milazzo is one of the few producers working seriously within the rare Mamertino DOC, an appellation near Milazzo in the Messina province with roots in ancient Roman viniculture. Their Nocera-blended reds reflect this underexplored north-east terroir.

vineyards.name: Hauner (Malvasia delle Lipari)
vineyards.address: Via Umberto I 83, 98050 Santa Marina di Salina (ME), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room at the estate on Salina. Open to visitors in the Aeolian Island season (April to October). Contact via the Hauner website.
vineyards.description: Founded by Carlo Hauner in 1963 on Salina in the Aeolian Islands, Hauner is the defining producer of Malvasia delle Lipari DOC. Their passito and naturale styles from Malvasia di Lipari vines are the benchmark for this rare island appellation.

verified.address_quoted: Via Umberto I 83, 98050 Santa Marina di Salina (ME)

vineyards.name: Caravaglio (Salina / Malvasia)
vineyards.address: Via Nazionale 12, 98050 Malfa, Salina (ME), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Seasonal tastings on Salina. Contact via the Caravaglio website.
vineyards.description: A second-generation family estate on Salina producing organic Malvasia delle Lipari DOC wines alongside a Nero d'Avola-based red. Caravaglio's minimal-intervention passito is a benchmark expression of the Aeolian Islands' volcanic terroir.

vineyards.name: Firriato Cavanera Etnea
vineyards.address: Contrada Verzella, Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine resort and restaurant on Etna's north slope. Visits and stays bookable via Firriato.
vineyards.description: Firriato's Etna estate in the Verzella contrada includes the Cavanera resort, one of the most complete wine-tourism experiences on Etna, with accommodation, restaurant, cellar visits and the Gaudensius traditional-method sparkling wine from Nerello Mascalese.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Verzella, Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily

vineyards.name: COS Pithos (amphora wines)
vineyards.address: SP3 Acate-Chiaramonte Km 14,300, 97019 Vittoria (RG), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Amphora wines tasted alongside DOCG range at the COS estate. By reservation.
vineyards.description: COS Pithos wines are fermented and aged in terracotta amphorae, reviving pre-industrial Sicilian vinification. The Pithos Bianco from Grecanico fermented on skins and the Pithos Rosso from Nero d'Avola are among Italy's most influential natural wines.

vineyards.name: Planeta Dorilli (Vittoria)
vineyards.address: Contrada Dorilli, 97019 Vittoria (RG), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.classification: Cerasuolo di Vittoria DOCG, Sicilia DOC
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings at the Vittoria estate bookable via the Planeta estate site.
vineyards.description: Planeta's Vittoria estate in the Dorilli contrada produces Cerasuolo di Vittoria DOCG, the only DOCG in Sicily, blending Nero d'Avola and Frappato. The estate has been instrumental in raising the profile of the Vittoria appellation.

vineyards.name: Tasca d'Almerita Capofaro (Salina)
vineyards.address: Via Faro 3, 98050 Malfa, Salina (ME), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Boutique hotel and wine resort on Salina with tasting experiences among the Malvasia vines overlooking the Tyrrhenian.
vineyards.description: Tasca d'Almerita's Capofaro estate on the island of Salina in the Aeolian Islands produces Malvasia delle Lipari DOC within a boutique hotel and winery. The terrace vines with views toward Stromboli create one of Italy's most dramatic wine-tourism settings.

vineyards.name: Serragghia (Pantelleria)
vineyards.address: Contrada Khamma 132, 91017 Pantelleria (TP), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment on Pantelleria. Contact via Gabrio Bini's Serragghia farm.
vineyards.description: Gabrio Bini's Serragghia on Pantelleria is a cult natural-wine producer farming Zibibbo in the alberello pantesco system without sulphur. The Serragghia passito and natural Zibibbo whites are among Italy's most sought-after natural sweet and aromatic wines.

vineyards.name: Maggio Vini
vineyards.address: Contrada Maccari, 96017 Noto (SR), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the Noto estate. Contact via the winery.
vineyards.description: Maggio Vini produces Noto DOC Nero d'Avola and Moscato di Noto from the Maccari contrada in the Syracuse province, one of the warmest and most sun-drenched zones in Sicily.

vineyards.name: Benanti Pietrarizzo Contrada
vineyards.address: Via Giuseppe Garibaldi 361, 95029 Viagrande (CT), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits available as part of the Benanti estate experience. Book via benanti.it.
vineyards.description: The Pietrarizzo contrada on the north slope of Etna at 800 metres produces Benanti's most mineral and savoury Nerello Mascalese. The Benanti family has farmed this plot since the 18th century, making it one of the oldest continuously cultivated contrade on the volcano.

vineyards.name: Duca di Salaparuta (Corvo)
vineyards.address: Via Nazionale SS 113, 90040 Casteldaccia (PA), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the historic Casteldaccia winery. Contact via the Duca di Salaparuta website.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1824 by the Duke of Salaparuta, Duca di Salaparuta (Corvo) is one of Sicily's oldest commercial wine estates. Their Duca Enrico is a landmark 100% Nero d'Avola and the Bianca di Valguarnera a prestigious Inzolia white. Now owned by Illva Saronno.

vineyards.name: Tenuta Rapitala
vineyards.address: Contrada Rapitala, 90043 Camporeale (PA), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings at the Camporeale estate. Contact via the Rapitala website.
vineyards.description: Tenuta Rapitala at Camporeale in the Palermo province was established by a Franco-Sicilian partnership in 1968. The estate produces a broad range of Sicilian varietal and blended wines across 170 hectares, with the Grand Cru their prestigious top bottling.

vineyards.name: Abele Ajello
vineyards.address: Via dei Mille 33, 91022 Castelvetrano (TP), Sicily, Italy
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment in the Belice Valley near Castelvetrano. Contact via the winery.
vineyards.description: Abele Ajello is a small organic producer in the Belice Valley near Castelvetrano, working with Catarratto and Nero d'Avola in the western Sicilian interior.
